title: verbascum boissieri
intro: Verbascum boissieri, also known as the Boissier's mullein, is a biennial or perennial plant species that belongs to the figwort family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which contain mucilage, a thick, protective substance that can soothe and calm irritated tissues. The health benefits of Verbascum boissieri include treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
